gcmotion.Collection#

class gcmotion.Collection(file, method='RK45')#
__init__(file, method='RK45')#

Initialized Collection class.

This class is a Collection of many particles. It reads their initial conditions form the ./parameters.py file, calculates their attributes and orbits, and calls upon the class Plots to plot the results.

Parameters:

  • file (.py file) – The python file containing the parameters.

  • method (str, optional) – The solver method. Defaults to “RK45”.

Methods

__init__(file[, method])

Initialized Collection class.

run_all([orbit])

Calculates all the particle's orbit, by running Particle.run() itself.
_check(file) → bool#

Checks for the validity of the parameters file.

Checks if all given parameter lists are of length 1 or otherwise of equal length with each other, and if their values are valid.

Also creates truth flags for every parameter: True if single-valued, and False if variable.

Parameters:

file (.py file) – The python file containing the parameters.

Returns:

Truth value depending on the validity of the file

Return type:

bool

_create()#

Initiates the particles.

run_all(orbit=True)#

Calculates all the particle’s orbit, by running Particle.run() itself.

Some plots and calculations, such as the parabolas and the orbit type calculation don’t require the whole orbit to be calculated, since they only depend on the initial conditions. We can therefore save valuable time.

Parameters:

orbit (bool, optional) – Whether or not to calculate the particles’ orbits. Defaults to True.
